Terms to ignore while counting. One item per line. User + Workspace + Workspace Folder values are merged and deduplicated.
configuration.wordFrequency.maxResults.d: Maximum number of frequency rows displayed in the panel, If the number is less than 10, 10 rows will be displayed.
configuration.wordFrequency.tokenizerEng: Tokenizer engine used for Chinese segmentation. Choose `jieba` to compare quality, or switch back to `segmentit` anytime.
